experience-pg.title: Experiences
experience-pg.desc: Education and hands-on roles that shaped how I work across software, AI, teaching, and team settings.

desc: Contributed to the backend development of an AI-integrated education platform.
Assisted with feature implementation, bug fixes, and codebase refactoring.

experiences.role: Marketing and Institutional Communications Team Member
desc: Made presentations about Sabancı University system.
Worked on a full-stack website with C# .NET and React.
Implemented REST APIs, authorization, and request flows.
Led weekly recitation sessions and office hours to reinforce Python and C++ course concepts.
Worked with assistant teams on course methodology and content.
Mentored high school students during a summer program.
Helped plan events and campus adaptation activities.
Practiced individual and team-based development.

about-pg.title: About Me
about-pg.desc: Hi there! I am Goktug Aygun, a Computer Science and Engineering graduate from Sabancı University and currently pursuing my MEng degree at KU Leuven. I am specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, and I am eager to apply my expertise by contributing to innovative projects. My main objective is to gain further experience by taking on roles in diverse teams and projects. With a keen interest in internship opportunities, I aim to continue developing my skills and knowledge in cutting-edge technological solutions.

projects-pg.title: Projects
projects-pg.desc: Selected projects, research work, and applications I have built or contributed to.

items.title: Cloud-Deployed Service-Oriented Distributed Ticketing System
desc: Designed and deployed a fault-tolerant, service-oriented ticketing platform on Google Cloud.
Implemented retry and timeout mechanisms to integrate reliable and unreliable providers.

items.title: Optimization of the Travelling Salesman Problem Using Genetic Algorithms
desc: Implemented a Genetic Algorithm solver for the Travelling Salesman Problem using established evolutionary operators.
Investigated convergence speed and solution quality across different configurations.

items.title: Analyzing Sabancı University Curricula in Relation to the SDGs
desc: Utilized LLM's to analyze the overlap of curricula with United Nation's Sustainable Development Goals with Dr. Husnu Yenigun.

items.title: LLM-based Course Assistant RAG Application
desc: Built RAG application with a team of four as graduation project.
Created a LLaMA-based RAG assistant for engagement with approved course materials.

items.title: FlightRoster - Aviation Upgraded
desc: Web application to support operations for an imaginary airline company.
Simulated project development process and led a team of 10.

items.title: Wordle
desc: Turkish Wordle clone built for the browser.

items.title: This Website
desc: A living place for projects, experience, and contact.

items.title: StudyBuddy Mobile App - Connecting Students for Collaborative Learning
desc: Developed mobile application to connect students studying same courses.

items.title: DiSUCord - Message Networking via Channels
desc: Discord-style messaging project using TCP sockets.
Built around channels and networked user communication.

items.title: Analysis of Female MP's in Turkish Assembly
desc: Team data analysis project on gender representation.
Explored female MPs in the Turkish parliament throughout the years.

items.title: Deaths Around the World by Cause Database App
desc: Database app built by a five-person team.
Processed, and visualized real-world date to explore causes of death.
